title: Document Pipeline Overview
name: Document Pipeline Overview
description: Show all documents and their chunk counts, extraction status, and resulting ontology classes.
content:
FOR doc IN documents
  LET chunk_count = LENGTH(FOR c IN chunks FILTER c.doc_id == doc._key RETURN 1)
  LET runs = (FOR r IN extraction_runs FILTER r.document_id == doc._key RETURN { status: r.status, model: r.model })
  LET class_count = LENGTH(FOR e IN extracted_from FILTER e._to == CONCAT('documents/', doc._key) RETURN 1)
  RETURN {
    _key: doc._key,
    filename: doc.filename,
    status: doc.status,
    chunks: chunk_count,
    extraction_runs: runs,
    extracted_classes: class_count
  }
value:
FOR doc IN documents
  LET chunk_count = LENGTH(FOR c IN chunks FILTER c.doc_id == doc._key RETURN 1)
  LET runs = (FOR r IN extraction_runs FILTER r.document_id == doc._key RETURN { status: r.status, model: r.model })
  LET class_count = LENGTH(FOR e IN extracted_from FILTER e._to == CONCAT('documents/', doc._key) RETURN 1)
  RETURN {
    _key: doc._key,
    filename: doc.filename,
    status: doc.status,
    chunks: chunk_count,
    extraction_runs: runs,
    extracted_classes: class_count
  }

title: Extraction Runs Status
name: Extraction Runs Status
description: All extraction runs with their status and timing info.
content:
FOR r IN extraction_runs
  SORT r.started_at DESC
  RETURN {
    _key: r._key,
    document_id: r.document_id,
    status: r.status,
    model: r.model,
    strategy: r.strategy,
    started_at: r.started_at,
    completed_at: r.completed_at,
    class_count: r.class_count,
    error_message: r.error_message
  }
value:
FOR r IN extraction_runs
  SORT r.started_at DESC
  RETURN {
    _key: r._key,
    document_id: r.document_id,
    status: r.status,
    model: r.model,
    strategy: r.strategy,
    started_at: r.started_at,
    completed_at: r.completed_at,
    class_count: r.class_count,
    error_message: r.error_message
  }

title: Document-to-Ontology Lineage
name: Document-to-Ontology Lineage
description: Full lineage: document -> classes extracted from it, with provenance.

title: Registered Ontologies
name: Registered Ontologies
description: All ontologies in the registry with their class and property counts.
content:
FOR ont IN ontology_registry
  LET cls_count = LENGTH(FOR c IN ontology_classes FILTER c.ontology_id == ont._key AND c.expired == 9223372036854775807 RETURN 1)
  LET prop_count = LENGTH(FOR p IN ontology_properties FILTER p.ontology_id == ont._key AND p.expired == 9223372036854775807 RETURN 1)
  RETURN {
    _key: ont._key,
    name: ont.name,
    description: ont.description,
    version: ont.version,
    source_document: ont.source_document,
    classes: cls_count,
    properties: prop_count,
    created_at: ont.created_at
  }
value:
FOR ont IN ontology_registry
  LET cls_count = LENGTH(FOR c IN ontology_classes FILTER c.ontology_id == ont._key AND c.expired == 9223372036854775807 RETURN 1)
  LET prop_count = LENGTH(FOR p IN ontology_properties FILTER p.ontology_id == ont._key AND p.expired == 9223372036854775807 RETURN 1)
  RETURN {
    _key: ont._key,
    name: ont.name,
    description: ont.description,
    version: ont.version,
    source_document: ont.source_document,
    classes: cls_count,
    properties: prop_count,
    created_at: ont.created_at
  }

title: Unprocessed Documents
name: Unprocessed Documents
description: Documents that have been uploaded but not yet fully processed.
content:
FOR doc IN documents
  FILTER doc.status != 'processed'
  SORT doc.uploaded_at DESC
  RETURN {
    _key: doc._key,
    filename: doc.filename,
    status: doc.status,
    content_type: doc.content_type,
    uploaded_at: doc.uploaded_at
  }
value:
FOR doc IN documents
  FILTER doc.status != 'processed'
  SORT doc.uploaded_at DESC
  RETURN {
    _key: doc._key,
    filename: doc.filename,
    status: doc.status,
    content_type: doc.content_type,
    uploaded_at: doc.uploaded_at
  }
